Section M: Declaration
Declaration: I/We certify that the fire detection and fire alarm system detailed in this certificate has been {% if certificate_type == 'installation' %}installed{% elsif certificate_type == 'commissioning' %}designed, installed, and commissioned{% else %}inspected and tested{% endif %} in accordance with BS 5839-1:2017 and is, to the best of my/our knowledge and belief, in a satisfactory condition for continued use, subject to any observations recorded above.
